data.title: Comprehensive DDoS Protection
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure DDoS Protection Standard to mitigate attacks.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Employs advanced threat detection systems to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Uses Azure Security Center for monitoring and alerts.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypted data in transit and at rest using modern standards.
data.technical_spec: Adopts TLS 1.2 for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust identity management strategies to control system access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure Active Directory for authentication and authorization.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits and assessments to enhance defenses.
data.technical_spec: Follows CERT and CIS benchmarks to audit and strengthen security posture.
